actorDisplayName.description: Display name of the message author (can be empty for type `deleted_users` and `guests`)

actorId.description: Actor id of the message author

expirationTimestamp.description: Unix time stamp when the message expires and should be removed from the clients UI without further note or warning (only available with `message-expiration` capability)

systemMessage.description: Empty for normal chat message or the type of the system message (untranslated)

features.description: List of features available on the server

features-local.description: List of features only available locally (not for federated conversations)

allowed.description: Whether file sharing is allowed in conversations

folder.description: User's attachment folder (only available for logged in users)

supported-reactions.description: List of supported reaction emojis during calls

predefined-backgrounds.description: List of file names relative to the spreed/img/backgrounds/ web path, e.g. `2_home.jpg`

predefined-backgrounds-v2.description: List of file paths relative to the server web root with leading slash, e.g. `/apps/spreed/img/backgrounds/2_home.jpg`

can-upload-background.description: Whether the user can upload custom virtual backgrounds

sip-enabled.description: Whether SIP is enabled on the server

sip-dialout-enabled.description: Whether SIP dial-out is enabled on the server

default-phone-region.description: Default phone region of the server

can-enable-sip.description: Whether the user can enable SIP for conversations

start-without-media.description: Whether calls start without media by default

max-duration.description: Maximum duration of a call in seconds, `0` means unlimited

blur-virtual-background.description: Whether the blur virtual background is available

live-transcription-target-language-id.description: The default target language for live transcription

play-sounds.description: Whether to play sounds for call events

grid-limit.description: Maximum number of participants shown in the grid view

grid-limit-enforced.description: Whether the grid limit is enforced by the server

max-length.description: Maximum length of a chat message

read-privacy.description: Read privacy setting for the user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-read-status-privacy))

has-translation-task-providers.description: Whether translation task providers are available

typing-privacy.description: Typing privacy setting for the user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-typing-privacy))

summary-threshold.description: Minimum number of chat messages before a summary can be generated

can-create.description: Whether the user can create conversations

force-passwords.description: Whether passwords are enforced for public conversations

description-length.description: Maximum length of a conversation description

retention-event.description: Retention period for event conversations in seconds, `0` means no retention

retention-phone.description: Retention period for phone conversations in seconds, `0` means no retention

retention-instant-meetings.description: Retention period for instant meetings in seconds, `0` means no retention

only-trusted-servers.description: Whether only trusted servers are allowed for federation

max-gif-size.description: Maximum GIF file size in bytes for previews

session-ping-limit.description: Maximum number of sessions that can be pinged in a single request

hello-v2-token-key.description: Public key for hello v2 authentication

config-local.description: Map of config keys that are only available locally (not for federated conversations)

deleted.description: Set to `true` when the message was deleted

isReplyable.description: True if the user can post a reply to this message (only available with `chat-replies` capability)

markdown.description: Whether the message should be rendered as markdown or shown as plain text

reactions.description: An array map with relation between reaction emoji and total count of reactions with this emoji

reactionsSelf.description: When the user reacted this is the list of emojis the user reacted with

referenceId.description: A reference string that was given while posting the message to be able to identify a sent message again (only available with `chat-reference-id` capability)

timestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds and UTC time zone

lastEditActorDisplayName.description: Display name of the last editing author (only available with `edit-messages` capability and when the message was actually edited)

lastEditActorId.description: Actor id of the last editing author (only available with `edit-messages` capability and when the message was actually edited)

lastEditActorType.description: Actor type of the last editing author - See [Constants - Actor types of chat messages](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#actor-types-of-chat-messages) (only available with `edit-messages` capability and when the message was actually edited)

lastEditTimestamp.description: Unix time stamp when the message was last edited (only available with `edit-messages` capability and when the message was actually edited)

silent.description: Whether the message was sent silently (only available with `silent-send-state` capability)

threadId.description: Thread ID if this message is part of a thread

isThread.description: Whether this message is the root of a thread

threadTitle.description: Title of the thread if this message is the root of a thread

threadReplies.description: Number of replies in the thread if this message is the root of a thread

pinnedActorType.description: Actor type of the attendee that pinned the message - Required capability: `pinned-messages`

pinnedActorId.description: Actor ID of the attendee that pinned the message - Required capability: `pinned-messages`

pinnedActorDisplayName.description: Display name of the attendee that pinned the message - Required capability: `pinned-messages`

pinnedAt.description: Timestamp when the message was pinned - Required capability: `pinned-messages`

pinnedUntil.description: Timestamp until when the message is pinned. If missing the message is pinned infinitely - Required capability: `pinned-messages`

threadId.description: Set when a thread is created with this message. If missing, no thread creation is associated with this message

threadTitle.description: Set when a thread is created with this message. If missing, no thread creation is associated with this message

message-id.description: ID of a message that this object refers to

preview-available.description: Whether a preview is available for the file

hide-download.description: Whether the download should be hidden for the file

mtime.description: Modification time of the file as UNIX timestamp

etag.description: ETag of the object for caching

width.description: Width of the object (e.g. image, video)

height.description: Height of the object (e.g. image, video)

actorId.description: The unique identifier for the given actor type

invitedActorId.description: The cloud id of the invited user

actorType.description: Actor type of the current user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#attendee-types))

attendeePermissions.description: Dedicated permissions for the current participant, if not `Custom` this are not the resulting permissions (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#attendee-permissions))

attendeePin.description: Unique dial-in authentication code for this user, when the conversation has SIP enabled (see `sipEnabled` attribute)

avatarVersion.description: Version of conversation avatar used to easier expiration of the avatar in case a moderator updates it, since the avatar endpoint should be cached for 24 hours. (only available with `avatar` capability)

breakoutRoomMode.description: Breakout room configuration mode (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#breakout-room-modes)) (only available with `breakout-rooms-v1` capability)

breakoutRoomStatus.description: Breakout room status (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#breakout-room-status)) (only available with `breakout-rooms-v1` capability)

callFlag.description: Combined flag of all participants in the current call (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-in-call-flag), only available with `conversation-call-flags` capability)

callPermissions.description: Call permissions, if not `Custom` this are not the resulting permissions, if set they will reset after the end of the call (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#attendee-permissions))

callRecording.description: Type of call recording (see [Constants - Call recording status](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#call-recording-status)) (only available with `recording-v1` capability)

callStartTime.description: Timestamp when the call was started (only available with `recording-v1` capability)

canDeleteConversation.description: Flag if the user can delete the conversation for everyone (not possible without moderator permissions or in one-to-one conversations)

canEnableSIP.description: Whether the given user can enable SIP for this conversation. Note that when the token is not-numeric only, SIP can not be enabled even if the user is permitted and a moderator of the conversation

canLeaveConversation.description: Flag if the user can leave the conversation (not possible for the last user with moderator permissions)

canStartCall.description: Flag if the user can start a new call in this conversation (joining is always possible) (only available with `start-call-flag` capability)

description.description: Description of the conversation (can also be empty) (only available with `room-description` capability)

displayName.description: `name` if non-empty, otherwise it falls back to a list of participants

hasCall.description: Flag if the conversation has an active call

hasPassword.description: Flag if the conversation has a password

isCustomAvatar.description: Flag if the conversation has a custom avatar (only available with `avatar` capability)

isFavorite.description: Flag if the conversation is favorited by the user

lastActivity.description: Timestamp of the last activity in the conversation, in seconds and UTC time zone

lastCommonReadMessage.description: ID of the last message read by every user that has read privacy set to public in a room. When the user themself has it set to private the value is `0` (only available with `chat-read-status` capability)

lastMessage.description: Last message in a conversation if available, otherwise empty. **Note:** Even when given the message will not contain the `parent` or `reactionsSelf` attribute due to performance reasons

lastPing.description: Timestamp of the user's session making the request

lastReadMessage.description: ID of the last read message in a room (only available with `chat-read-marker` capability)

listable.description: Listable scope for the room (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#listable-scope)) (only available with `listable-rooms` capability)

liveTranscriptionLanguageId.description: ID of the language to use for live transcriptions in the room,

lobbyState.description: Webinar lobby restriction (0-1), if the participant is a moderator they can always join the conversation (only available with `webinary-lobby` capability) (See [Webinar lobby states](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#webinar-lobby-states))

lobbyTimer.description: Timestamp when the lobby will be automatically disabled (only available with `webinary-lobby` capability)

mentionPermissions.description: Whether all participants can mention using `@all` or only moderators (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#mention-permissions)) (only available with `mention-permissions` capability)

messageExpiration.description: The message expiration time in seconds in this chat. Zero if disabled. (only available with `message-expiration` capability)

name.description: Name of the conversation (can also be empty)

notificationCalls.description: The call notification level for the user (see [Participant call notification levels](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-call-notification-levels))

notificationLevel.description: The notification level for the user (See [Participant notification levels](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-notification-levels))

objectType.description: The type of object that the conversation is associated with (See [Object types](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#object-types))

participantFlags.description: "In call" flags of the user's session making the request (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-in-call-flag)) (only available with `in-call-flags` capability)

participantType.description: Permissions level of the current user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-types))

permissions.description: Combined final permissions for the current participant, permissions are picked in order of attendee then call then default and the first which is `Custom` will apply (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#attendee-permissions))

readOnly.description: Read-only state for the current user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#read-only-states)) (only available with `read-only-rooms` capability)

recordingConsent.description: Whether recording consent is required before joining a call (Only 0 and 1 will be returned, see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#recording-consent-required)) (only available with `recording-consent` capability)

sessionId.description: `'0'` if not connected, otherwise an up to 512 character long string that is the identifier of the user's session making the request. Should only be used to pre-check if the user joined already with this session, but this might be outdated by the time of usage, so better check via [Get list of participants in a conversation](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/participant/#get-list-of-participants-in-a-conversation)

status.description: Only available for one-to-one conversations, when `includeStatus=true` is set and the user has a status

statusClearAt.description: Only available for one-to-one conversations, when `includeStatus=true` is set and the user has a status, can still be null even with a status

statusIcon.description: Only available for one-to-one conversations, when `includeStatus=true` is set and the user has a status, can still be null even with a status

statusMessage.description: Only available for one-to-one conversations, when `includeStatus=true` is set and the user has a status, can still be null even with a status

token.description: Token identifier of the conversation which is used for further interaction

type.description: See list of conversation types in the [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants/#conversation-types)

unreadMention.description: Flag if the user was mentioned since their last visit

unreadMentionDirect.description: Flag if the user was mentioned directly (ignoring `@all` mentions) since their last visit (only available with `direct-mention-flag` capability)

unreadMessages.description: Number of unread chat messages in the conversation (only available with `chat-v2` capability)

isArchived.description: Flag if the conversation is archived by the user (only available with `archived-conversations-v2` capability)

attributes.description: Bit-flag of enabled attributes of this conversation (only available with capability: `conversation-attributes`). See [attributes list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants/#conversation-attributes) for details

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Token of the room

parameters.name: x-nextcloud-federation
parameters.description: Set to 1 when the request is performed by another Nextcloud Server to indicate a federation request

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-random
parameters.description: Random seed used to generate the request checksum

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-checksum
parameters.description: Checksum over the request body to verify authenticity from the Sipbridge

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

parameters.name: pin
parameters.description: PIN the participant used to dial-in

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-random
parameters.description: Random seed used to generate the request checksum

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-checksum
parameters.description: Checksum over the request body to verify authenticity from the Sipbridge

parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-checksum
parameters.description: Checksum over the request body to verify authenticity from the Sipbridge

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

caller.description: Phone number of the person calling in

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-random
parameters.description: Random seed used to generate the request checksum

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-checksum
parameters.description: Checksum over the request body to verify authenticity from the Sipbridge

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

404.description: Number is not assigned to any user

options.description: Additional details to verify the validity of the request

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-random

400.description: Phone number and details could not be confirmed

404.description: Phone number is not invited as a participant

post.summary: Create a guest by their dial-in

parameters.name: talk-sipbridge-random

parameters.description: Checksum over the request body to verify authenticity from the Sipbridge

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

delete.summary: Reset call ID of a dial-out participant when the SIP gateway rejected it

parameters.name: callId
parameters.description: The call ID provided by the SIP bridge earlier to uniquely identify the call to terminate

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional details to verify the validity of the request

400.description: Call ID mismatch or attendeeId not found in $options
